import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Station 17 is Causeway Bay - already resolved
print("RESOLVED: Causeway Bay = 17")

# Fetch PM2.5 and AQHI readings for station 17 on 2025-08-02
# Time periods: 6-10 AM (06:00 to 10:00) and 5-9 PM (17:00 to 21:00)
query_air = text("""
SELECT datetime, aqhi, pm2_5
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 17
  AND datetime >= '2025-08-02 00:00:00'
  AND datetime < '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
  AND (
    (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM datetime) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM datetime) < 10)
    OR
    (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM datetime) >= 17 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM datetime) < 21)
  )
ORDER BY datetime
""")
df_air = pd.read_sql(query_air, engine)
print(f"Air quality readings for Causeway Bay station 17 on 2025-08-02 (6-10 AM & 5-9 PM): {len(df_air)} rows")
print(df_air.to_string())

# Now find Central-Wan Chai highway segments
# First, find streets that are highways in Central and Wan Chai areas
query_streets = text("""
SELECT id, name_en, street_code, street_type
FROM street
WHERE street_type = 'highway'
  AND (name_en ILIKE '%Central%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Wan Chai%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Gloucester%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Connaught%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Harcourt%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Queensway%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Island Eastern%' OR name_en ILIKE '%Causeway%')
ORDER BY name_en
""")
df_streets = pd.read_sql(query_streets, engine)
print(f"\nPotential Central-Wan Chai highway streets: {len(df_streets)} rows")
print(df_streets.to_string())

# Get road segments for these streets
if len(df_streets) > 0:
    street_ids = tuple(df_streets['id'].tolist())
    query_segments = text(f"""
    SELECT rs.id, rs.road_segment_code, rs.street_id, rs.length, rs.road_level, rs.direction
    FROM road_segment rs

    """)

    print(df_segments.to_string())
    
    # Fetch traffic data for these segments during the specified periods
    segment_ids = tuple(df_segments['id'].tolist())
    query_traffic = text(f"""
    SELECT hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.speed, hrst.congestion_status, hrst.congestion_index, hrst.datetime

      )
    ORDER BY hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.datetime
    """)
    df_traffic = pd.read_sql(query_traffic, engine)
    print(f"\nTraffic congestion data: {len(df_traffic)} rows")
    if len(df_traffic) > 0:

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# ============================================================
# PART 1: Compute station 17 (Causeway Bay) statistics for 2025-08-02
# ============================================================
df_air = causeway_bay_air_quality_20250802.copy()
df_air['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(df_air['datetime'])

# Compute mean and max for PM2.5 and AQHI over the full day
mean_pm2_5 = float(df_air['pm2_5'].mean())
max_pm2_5 = float(df_air['pm2_5'].max())
mean_aqhi = float(df_air['aqhi'].mean())
max_aqhi = float(df_air['aqhi'].max())

print(f"=== Station 17 (Causeway Bay) Statistics for 2025-08-02 ===")
print(f"Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5:.2f} µg/m³")
print(f"Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5:.2f} µg/m³")
print(f"Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi:.2f}")
print(f"Max AQHI: {max_aqhi:.2f}")

# ============================================================
# PART 2: Prepare traffic data - aggregate by hour
# ============================================================
df_traffic = causeway_bay_traffic_20250802.copy()
df_traffic['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(df_traffic['datetime'])

# Check traffic columns
print(f"\nTraffic columns: {list(df_traffic.columns)}")

# Aggregate traffic to hourly level (mean congestion_index per hour across all segments)
df_traffic['hour'] = df_traffic['datetime'].dt.hour
hourly_traffic = df_traffic.groupby('hour').agg(
    mean_congestion_index=('congestion_index', 'mean'),
    mean_speed=('speed', 'mean'),
    mean_congestion_status=('congestion_status', 'mean'),
    segment_count=('road_segment_id', 'nunique')
).reset_index()

print("\n=== Hourly Traffic Aggregation (all segments) ===")
print(hourly_traffic)

# ============================================================
# PART 3: Merge air quality with traffic by hour
# ============================================================
df_air['hour'] = df_air['datetime'].dt.hour
merged = pd.merge(df_air, hourly_traffic, on='hour', how='inner')
merged = merged.sort_values('hour')

print("\n=== Merged Air Quality + Traffic Data (by hour) ===")
print(merged[['hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi', 'mean_congestion_index', 'mean_speed', 'mean_congestion_status']].to_string(index=False))

# ============================================================
# PART 4: Define time windows and compute correlations
# ============================================================
# Window 1: 6-10 AM (hours 6,7,8,9 - inclusive start, exclusive end)
window1_hours = [6, 7, 8, 9]
# Window 2: 5-9 PM (hours 17,18,19,20 - inclusive start, exclusive end)
window2_hours = [17, 18, 19, 20]

# Filter merged data for each window
window1 = merged[merged['hour'].isin(window1_hours)].copy()
window2 = merged[merged['hour'].isin(window2_hours)].copy()

print(f"\n=== Window 1: 6-10 AM ===")
print(f"Hours: {sorted(window1['hour'].unique())}")
print(f"Records: {len(window1)}")
if len(window1) > 0:
    print(window1[['hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi', 'mean_congestion_index', 'mean_speed']].to_string(index=False))

print(f"\n=== Window 2: 5-9 PM ===")
print(f"Hours: {sorted(window2['hour'].unique())}")
print(f"Records: {len(window2)}")
if len(window2) > 0:
    print(window2[['hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi', 'mean_congestion_index', 'mean_speed']].to_string(index=False))

# ============================================================
# PART 5: Compute correlations for each window
# ============================================================
print("\n" + "="*60)
print("CORRELATION ANALYSIS: Traffic Congestion vs Air Quality")
print("="*60)

for window_name, window_df, hours_desc in [
    ("Window 1: 6-10 AM", window1, "6-10 AM"),
    ("Window 2: 5-9 PM", window2, "5-9 PM"),
    ("Full Day", merged, "00-23")
]:
    print(f"\n--- {window_name} ---")
    if len(window_df) < 3:
        print(f"Insufficient data points ({len(window_df)}) for meaningful correlation")
        continue
    
    # PM2.5 vs Congestion Index
    corr_pm25_cong = window_df['pm2_5'].corr(window_df['mean_congestion_index'])
    # AQHI vs Congestion Index
    corr_aqhi_cong = window_df['aqhi'].corr(window_df['mean_congestion_index'])
    # PM2.5 vs Speed (negative correlation expected - more congestion = higher pollution)
    corr_pm25_speed = window_df['pm2_5'].corr(window_df['mean_speed'])
    # AQHI vs Speed
    corr_aqhi_speed = window_df['aqhi'].corr(window_df['mean_speed'])
    # PM2.5 vs Congestion Status
    corr_pm25_status = window_df['pm2_5'].corr(window_df['mean_congestion_status'])
    # AQHI vs Congestion Status
    corr_aqhi_status = window_df['aqhi'].corr(window_df['mean_congestion_status'])

# Compute mean and max for the full day

mean_aqhi = float(df_air['aqhi'].mean())
max_aqhi = float(df_air['aqhi'].max())

print(f"Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5:.2f}")
print(f"Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi:.2f}")
print(f"Max AQHI: {max_aqhi:.2f}")

# ============================================================
# 2. RUSH HOUR ANALYSIS
# ============================================================

# Define rush hour windows (inclusive start, exclusive end)
# Window 1: 6-10 AM (hours 6,7,8,9)
# Window 2: 5-9 PM (hours 17,18,19,20)
window1_hours = [6, 7, 8, 9]
window2_hours = [17, 18, 19, 20]

# Filter air quality data for each window
window1_air = df_air[df_air['hour'].isin(window1_hours)]
window2_air = df_air[df_air['hour'].isin(window2_hours)]

print(f"\n=== Window 1 (6-10 AM) Air Quality ===")
print(window1_air.to_string())
print(f"\nWindow 1 - Mean PM2.5: {window1_air['pm2_5'].mean():.2f}, Mean AQHI: {window1_air['aqhi'].mean():.2f}")

print(f"\n=== Window 2 (5-9 PM) Air Quality ===")
print(window2_air.to_string())
print(f"\nWindow 2 - Mean PM2.5: {window2_air['pm2_5'].mean():.2f}, Mean AQHI: {window2_air['aqhi'].mean():.2f}")

# The Central-Wan Chai Bypass is likely the key highway
query_segments = text("""
SELECT rs.id, rs.street_id, rs.road_segment_code, rs.length, rs.direction, rs.free_flow_speed, s.name_en, s.street_type
FROM road_segment rs
JOIN street s ON rs.street_id = s.id
WHERE s.name_en ILIKE '%Central%Wan%Chai%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Wan Chai Bypass%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Central Bypass%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Gloucester%'

   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Connaught%'
ORDER BY s.name_en, rs.id
""")

print(df_segments.to_string())

if seg_ids:
    query_traffic = text(f"""
    SELECT hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.speed, hrst.congestion_status, hrst.congestion_index, hrst.datetime
    FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic hrst
    WHERE hrst.road_segment_id IN ({','.join(map(str, seg_ids))})
      AND hrst.datetime >= '2025-08-02 00:00:00'
      AND hrst.datetime < '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
    ORDER BY hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.datetime
    """)
    df_traffic = pd.read_sql(query_traffic, engine)
    df_traffic['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(df_traffic['datetime'])
    df_traffic['hour'] = df_traffic['datetime'].dt.hour
    
    print(f"\n=== Traffic Data (total: {len(df_traffic)} records) ===")
    print(df_traffic.to_string())
    
    # Compute average congestion index per hour across all segments
    hourly_traffic = df_traffic.groupby('hour').agg({
        'congestion_index': 'mean',
        'speed': 'mean',
        'congestion_status': 'mean'
    }).reset_index()
    print(f"\n=== Hourly Average Traffic Metrics ===")
    print(hourly_traffic.to_string())
    
    # Filter traffic for each window
    window1_traffic = df_traffic[df_traffic['hour'].isin(window1_hours)]
    window2_traffic = df_traffic[df_traffic['hour'].isin(window2_hours)]
    
    print(f"\n=== Window 1 (6-10 AM) Traffic ===")
    print(f"Mean Congestion Index: {window1_traffic['congestion_index'].mean():.3f}")
    print(f"Mean Speed: {window1_traffic['speed'].mean():.1f}")
    print(window1_traffic.groupby('hour').agg({'congestion_index': 'mean', 'speed': 'mean'}).to_string())
    
    print(f"\n=== Window 2 (5-9 PM) Traffic ===")
    print(f"Mean Congestion Index: {window2_traffic['congestion_index'].mean():.3f}")
    print(f"Mean Speed: {window2_traffic['speed'].mean():.1f}")
    print(window2_traffic.groupby('hour').agg({'congestion_index': 'mean', 'speed': 'mean'}).to_string())
    
    # Merge air quality and traffic data by hour for correlation analysis
    hourly_air = df_air[['hour', 'aqhi', 'pm2_5']].copy()
    merged = pd.merge(hourly_air, hourly_traffic, on='hour', how='inner')
    print(f"\n=== Merged Hourly Data for Correlation ===")
    print(merged.to_string())
    
    # Compute correlations
    if len(merged) > 2:
        corr_pm25_cong = merged['pm2_5'].corr(merged['congestion_index'])
        corr_aqhi_cong = merged['aqhi'].corr(merged['congestion_index'])
        corr_pm25_speed = merged['pm2_5'].corr(merged['speed'])
        corr_aqhi_speed = merged['aqhi'].corr(merged['speed'])
        corr_pm25_status = merged['pm2_5'].corr(merged['congestion_status'])
        corr_aqhi_status = merged['aqhi'].corr(merged['congestion_status'])
        
        print(f"\n=== Correlation Analysis ===")

        print(f"AQHI vs Congestion Index: {corr_aqhi_cong:.4f}")
        print(f"PM2.5 vs Speed: {corr_pm25_speed:.4f}")

        print(f"PM2.5 vs Congestion Status: {corr_pm25_status:.4f}")
        print(f"AQHI vs Congestion Status: {corr_aqhi_status:.4f}")
    else:
        print("Not enough data points for correlation")
else:

    ORDER BY hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.datetime
    """)

    df_traf['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(df_traf['datetime'])
    df_traf['hour'] = df_traf['datetime'].dt.hour
    
    # Define windows
    window1_hours = [6, 7, 8, 9]  # 6-10 AM
    window2_hours = [17, 18, 19, 20]  # 5-9 PM

    w2_traf = df_traf[df_traf['hour'].isin(window2_hours)]

        'congestion_status': 'mean'
    }).reset_index()

query_cw = text("""
SELECT hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.speed, hrst.congestion_status, hrst.congestion_index, hrst.datetime,
       s.name_en as street_name
FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic hrst
JOIN road_segment rs ON hrst.road_segment_id = rs.id
JOIN street s ON rs.street_id = s.id
WHERE (s.name_en ILIKE '%Central%Wan%Chai%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Wan Chai Bypass%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Central Bypass%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Gloucester%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Harcourt%'
   OR s.name_en ILIKE '%Connaught%')
  AND hrst.datetime >= '2025-08-02 00:00:00'
  AND hrst.datetime < '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
ORDER BY hrst.road_segment_id, hrst.datetime
""")

    print(df_cw.to_string())
    
    # Define rush hour windows
    window1_hours = [6, 7, 8, 9]  # 6-10 AM
    window2_hours = [17, 18, 19, 20]  # 5-9 PM

    w1_air = df_air[df_air['hour'].isin(window1_hours)]

    w2_traf = df_cw[df_cw['hour'].isin(window2_hours)]

        print(f"PM2.5 vs Congestion Index: {merged['pm2_5'].corr(merged['congestion_index']):.4f}")
        print(f"AQHI vs Congestion Index: {merged['aqhi'].corr(merged['congestion_index']):.4f}")
        print(f"PM2.5 vs Speed: {merged['pm2_5'].corr(merged['speed']):.4f}")
        print(f"AQHI vs Speed: {merged['aqhi'].corr(merged['speed']):.4f}")
else:

    ORDER BY s.name_en
    """)

    print("All streets with traffic data on 2025-08-02:")
    print(df_broad.to_string())

# First, find Central-Wan Chai highway segments efficiently
query_seg = text("""
SELECT rs.id, s.name_en
FROM road_segment rs
JOIN street s ON rs.street_id = s.id
WHERE s.name_en IN ('Central-Wan Chai Bypass', 'Gloucester Road', 'Harcourt Road', 'Connaught Road Central')
ORDER BY s.name_en, rs.id
""")
df_seg = pd.read_sql(query_seg, engine)

seg_ids = df_seg['id'].tolist()
if seg_ids:
    # Query traffic only for these specific segments - use COUNT first to check size
    query_count = text(f"""
    SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
    FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic
    WHERE road_segment_id IN ({','.join(map(str, seg_ids))})
      AND datetime >= '2025-08-02 00:00:00'
      AND datetime < '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
